title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain Ollama integration enables calling Ollama models through the standard LangChain LLM interface.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; chat, stream, and pull models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user, model manager, and RAG.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Reddit discussion on building RAG pipelines over Ollama with embeddings and vector DBs.

title: chainlit/chainlit
summary: Python chat-app framework with one-line Ollama adapter for rapid LLM UI prototyping.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Lightweight CLI chat wrapper with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage options.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model with slash commands.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated collection of community-created Modelfiles for Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit app demonstrating RAG over PDFs using Ollama embeddings and Chroma.

title: ollama-hnswlib
summary: PyPI package adding hnswlib vector-store helper for Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generate, chat, and embedding methods.
